name: stall_check
description: Quartermaster checks for stalled tasks and nudges their owners. Runs daily at 10am.

message.value: Run job: stall_check. Check agent_actions for tasks already nudged today so you don't double-ping. Then query tasks with status='assigned'. For each task where 'due' is today or past (or that has sat assigned with no progress), compose a nudge and log it to agent_actions (kind=nudge). Return a summary of what you sent.
